zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Aldington於1496年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可金也斯 琳時，她的父親William Fenn-23歲，母親Alice Ransom-25歲。她於1515年與Simon Fenn在英國英格蘭諾福爾可金也斯 琳結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1537年在英國英格蘭素福爾可布藍普頓享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可布藍普頓聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Aldington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Aldington (Worcs), which is recorded as Aldintona in 1086 and Aldington in 1227, and perhaps also from Aldington (Kent), which is recorded as Ealdintune in about 1090 and Aldyngtone in 1253–4. The place-names probably both mean ‘farmstead associated with a man called Ealda’, from the Old English personal name Ealda + the connective particle -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Aldington was born in 1496, in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Fenn, was -23 and her mother, Alice Ransom, was -25. She married Simon Fenn in 1515, in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1537, in Brampton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Brampton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Saint Peter's Church, Brampton, East Suf: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브램프턴 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Aldington(이)가 1496년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 킨그'스 린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Fenn(은)는 -23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Ransom(은)는 -25세였다. 그녀는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 킨그'스 린에서 Simon Fenn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1537년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브램프턴에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브램프턴 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.Saint Peter's Church, Brampton, East Suf: ст питир'с чурч, брамптон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Aldington родилась в 1496 г. в местности кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Fenn было -23 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Ransom, -25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon Fenn в 1515 г. в местности кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1537 г. в местности брамптон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности ст питир'с чурч, брамптон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Aldington nació en 1496, en King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Fenn, tenía -23 años y su mamá, Alice Ransom, tenía -25 años. Se casó con Simon Fenn en 1515, en King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1537, en Brampton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en St Peter's Church, Brampton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
